title: iris × borzae
intro: Iris × borzae, also known as the Borza iris or Borza hybrid iris, is a cross-bred plant species between the Iris germanica and Iris sanguinea, resulting in a unique and vibrant flowering plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Iris × borzae include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, flu, and other illnesses. In herbal preparations, Iris × borzae is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
